title: Cummins 2025 Annual Report
note: Primary annual-report source for segments, strategy, financial context, and Accelera restructuring context.

title: Engines
note: Company product page describing Cummins diesel, natural gas, alternative-fuel engines and served applications.

title: Accelera by Cummins
note: Product source for Accelera battery systems, fuel cells, ePowertrain systems, and electrolyzers.

title: Cummins Inc. (CMI) Stock Price & Overview
note: Market-data source for market capitalization, P/E ratio, revenue, net income, and company segment summary around the May 22, 2026 close.

title: Cummins | CMI Stock Price, Company Overview & News
note: Secondary market-data source for market capitalization, P/E ratio, margins, and profitability metrics.

title: The FreeEMS Open Source Project
note: Open-source engine-management project used as an alternative control-layer reference for combustion engines.

title: SECU-3 Open Source Engine Management System
note: Open-source ignition and fuel-injection control project used as supporting evidence for open engine-control feasibility.

title: Power Cube
note: Open hardware-style modular hydraulic power-unit project relevant to decentralized small-scale power equipment.

title: Power Cube Fabrication Manual
note: Build documentation source for the Open Source Ecology Power Cube concept.

title: OpenEMS
note: Open-source energy-management platform source for decentralized battery, grid, renewable, and load orchestration.

title: OpenEMS GitHub Repository
note: Public repository for the OpenEMS modular energy-management platform.

title: foxBMS
note: Open battery-management-system platform relevant to battery and fuel-cell-adjacent energy-system openness.

title: pymgrid: An Open-Source Python Microgrid Simulator for Applied Artificial Intelligence Research
note: Research source supporting open microgrid simulation and control experimentation.

title: AlphaPEM: an open-source dynamic 1D physics-based PEM fuel cell model for embedded applications
note: Research source for open fuel-cell modeling as an enabler for transparent hydrogen-system development.

title: Free open reference implementation of a two-phase PEM fuel cell model
note: Research source supporting open reference implementations for fuel-cell modeling and validation.
